languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, esteemed colleague, that the breadth of your thinking is sufficient to understand and appreciate the working principle of this creation. I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it only now, but I am extremely satisfied to see the developing changes in your approach."

languages.text: "Отрадно видеть, уважаемый коллега, что широта вашего мышления достаточна, чтобы понять и оценить принцип работы этого творения. Не могу предположить, почему ты решил продемонстрировать ее лишь сейчас, но крайне удовлетворен намечающимися переменами в твоем подходе".

"It is gratifying to see, esteemed colleague, that the breadth of your thinking is sufficient to understand and appreciate the working principle of this creation. I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it only now, but I am extremely satisfied to see the developing changes in your approach."
languages.original_text: "Отрадно видеть, уважаемый коллега, что широта вашего мышления достаточна, чтобы понять и оценить принцип работы этого творения. Не могу предположить, почему ты решил продемонстрировать ее лишь сейчас, но крайне удовлетворен намечающимися переменами в твоем подходе".

I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it only now, but I am extremely satisfied to see the developing changes in your approach."

"It is gratifying to see, esteemed colleague, that the breadth of your thinking is sufficient to understand and appreciate the working principle of this creation. I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it only now, but I am extremely satisfied to see the developing changes in your approach."

"It is gratifying to see, esteemed colleague, that the breadth of your thinking is sufficient to understand and appreciate the working principle of this creation. I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it only now, but I am extremely satisfied to see the developing changes in your approach."

languages.text: 「この作品がどのように作られているのかを理解し、その原理を評価できるほど、あなたの考え方は広いです。なぜ今、この作品を説明しようと思ったのかはわかりませんが、この分野における知識の追求に対するあなたの考え方は、非常に満足です」
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, esteemed colleague, that the breadth of your thinking is sufficient to understand and appreciate the working principle of this creation. I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it just now, but I am extremely satisfied with your view of the Quest for Knowledge in this area."

traits.locale_text: 「この作品がどのように作られているのかを理解し、その原理を評価できるほど、あなたの考え方は広いです。なぜ今、この作品を説明しようと思ったのかはわかりませんが、この分野における知識の追求に対するあなたの考え方は、非常に満足です。」

languages.text: « Il est gratifiant, vénérable collègue, de voir que vos capacités de réflexion vous permettent de comprendre et d'apprécier le principe fonctionnel de cette création. Même si je me demande pourquoi vous avez choisi ce moment pour nous en faire une démonstration, je suis extrêmement satisfait de voir les changements qui s'opèrent dans votre approche. »
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, esteemed colleague, that the breadth of your thinking is sufficient to understand and appreciate the working principle of this creation. I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it only now, but I am extremely satisfied to see the developing changes in your approach."

traits.locale_text: « Il est gratifiant, vénérable collègue, de voir que vos capacités de réflexion vous permettent de comprendre et d'apprécier le principe fonctionnel de cette création. Même si je me demande pourquoi vous avez choisi ce moment pour nous en faire une démonstration, je suis extrêmement satisfait de voir les changements qui s'opèrent dans votre approche. »

languages.text: "Es ist erfreulich zu sehen, geschätzte Kollegen, dass Euer Denkvermögen ausreicht, um das Funktionsprinzip dieser Kreation zu verstehen und zu schätzen. Ich weiß nicht, warum Ihr sie erst jetzt offenbart, aber ich bin extrem zufrieden mit Eurer veränderten Herangehensweise."
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, esteemed colleague, that the breadth of your thinking is sufficient to understand and appreciate the working principle of this creation. I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it only now, but I am extremely satisfied to see the developing changes in your approach."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist erfreulich zu sehen, geschätzte Kollegen, dass Euer Denkvermögen ausreicht, um das Funktionsprinzip dieser Kreation zu verstehen und zu schätzen. Ich weiß nicht, warum Ihr sie erst jetzt offenbart, aber ich bin extrem zufrieden mit Eurer veränderten Herangehensweise."

languages.text: "Saygıdeğer meslektaşım, düşünce genişliğinizin bu yaratımın çalışma prensibini anlamak ve takdir etmek için yeterli olduğunu görmek ne hoş. Bunu neden tam şu anda göstermeye karar verdiğinizi tahmin edemiyorum ancak yaklaşımınızdaki değişimi görmekten son derece memnunum."
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, esteemed colleague, that the breadth of your thinking is sufficient to understand and appreciate the working principle of this creation. I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it only now, but I am extremely satisfied to see the developing changes in your approach."

traits.locale_text: "Saygıdeğer meslektaşım, düşünce genişliğinizin bu yaratımın çalışma prensibini anlamak ve takdir etmek için yeterli olduğunu görmek ne hoş. Bunu neden tam şu anda göstermeye karar verdiğinizi tahmin edemiyorum ancak yaklaşımınızdaki değişimi görmekten son derece memnunum."

languages.text: «Me congratula constatar, estimado colega, que su raciocinio es lo bastante amplio para saber entender y valorar el principio operativo de esta creación. Ignoro por qué ha decidido exhibirlo ahora mismo, pero me complacen los cambios de su enfoque».
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, esteemed colleague, that the breadth of your thinking is sufficient to understand and appreciate the working principle of this creation. I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it only now, but I am extremely satisfied to see the developing changes in your approach."

traits.locale_text: «Me congratula constatar, estimado colega, que su raciocinio es lo bastante amplio para saber entender y valorar el principio operativo de esta creación. Ignoro por qué ha decidido exhibirlo ahora mismo, pero me complacen los cambios de su enfoque».

languages.text: “尊敬的同僚，你的思维广度足以理解和欣赏此造物的运作原理，让人倍感欣慰。我虽无法猜透你为何直到现在才展示这一点，但我对你思维方式发生的变化非常满意。”
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, esteemed colleague, that the breadth of your thinking is sufficient to understand and appreciate the working principle of this creation. I cannot guess why you decided to demonstrate it only now, but I am extremely satisfied to see the developing changes in your approach."

traits.locale_text: “尊敬的同僚，你的思维广度足以理解和欣赏此造物的运作原理，让人倍感欣慰。我虽无法猜透你为何直到现在才展示这一点，但我对你思维方式发生的变化非常满意。”
